mapper.select: SELECT a.id AS "recordId", a.source_item_id AS "id", a.source_item_id AS "sourceItemId", a.name, a.name AS "title", a.name AS "label", a.result, CASE WHEN a.result = 1 THEN 'completed' WHEN a.result = 2 THEN 'failed' WHEN a.result = 3 THEN 'notApplicable' ELSE 'pending' END AS "status", CASE WHEN a.result = 1 THEN '验收完成' WHEN a.result = 2 THEN '不通过' WHEN a.result = 3 THEN '不适用' ELSE '待验收' END AS "statusText", a.remark, a.attachments, a.inspected_by AS "inspectedBy", inspector.name AS "inspectedByName", a.inspected_at AS "inspectedAt", a.created_by AS "createdBy", a.created_at AS "createdAt", a.updated_by AS "updatedBy", a.updated_at AS "updatedAt" FROM inspection_item a LEFT JOIN sys_account inspector ON inspector.id = a.inspected_by WHERE a.inspection_id = #{inspectionId} ORDER BY a.id ASC
